name: Control One bank baseline Headscale ACL intent
description: Production ACL and route-approval templates for a bank-owned Headscale deployment connected to Control One imports.
guardrails: OIDC groups should drive durable access intent.
Production subnet routes must be explicitly approved before use.
Preauth keys are short-lived, scoped, and tied to a change ticket.
Route owners are separate from broad human admin groups.
Break-glass tags require ticket references and time-boxed membership.

groups.purpose: Security administrators allowed to reach hardened management ports.
Platform administrators allowed to reach production infrastructure management.
Application operators allowed to reach production app services.
Database administrators allowed to reach database listeners.
Headless route owners that bridge production private networks.

guards: Route approval is recorded in the bank change system.
Route owner node is monitored and patched as production infrastructure.
Control One import shows route approved=true before traffic is allowed.
Application route CIDRs match approved CMDB service ranges.
No database listener is reachable through app-only ACLs.
Database route approval requires security and DBA owner approval.
App team groups cannot reach database CIDRs unless explicitly approved.

templates.name: Production management access
guards: Admin group membership is reviewed monthly.
Route nodes are not assigned to broad human admin groups.

templates.name: Application team access
guards: No SSH, RDP, or database ports in this template.
Application CIDRs are approved in the bank CMDB.

templates.name: Database administration access
guards: Database admin membership requires manager and security approval.
No broad app-team access to database ports.

templates.name: Emergency break-glass access
guards: Ticket id is recorded in the ACL change.
